purpose: Formal lifecycle gates for read-only stock decision-support models and candidates.

global_invariants.requirement: The system must not place, preview, modify, or cancel trades, options, watchlists, or Robinhood write actions.
Private portfolio data, account identifiers, credentials, and generated private artifacts must not be committed to the public repository.
Past forecasts, failed predictions, and model-version outputs must remain append-only and must not be rewritten to improve apparent performance.
Current BUY and SELL labels must be blocked when required price data is stale, missing, or classified POOR.

promotion_gates.minimum_evidence: Candidate has a versioned manifest frozen before sealed outcomes are inspected.
Sealed forward period contains at least 30 matured directional forecast episodes with both BUY and SELL represented.
Displayed confidence buckets are within 10 percentage points of realized directional success, with no bucket showing severe overconfidence.
BUY and SELL precision lower confidence bounds are acceptable across at least five symbols.
Leave-one-symbol-out and top-symbol concentration gates pass for promoted directional evidence.
Fixed train, development, and sealed periods do not produce conflicting directional or relative classifications.
Experiment families with medium or high multiple-testing risk have false-discovery correction or sealed replication.
Refresh, archive verification, public-safety checks, and CI pass without required manual repair.

probation_gates.trigger: Recent matured forecast calibration misses the expected bucket by more than 10 percentage points but no rollback invariant is violated.
BUY or SELL coverage materially collapses versus the promoted baseline without an intentional policy change.
Refresh remains DEGRADED for required market data or provider failures recur across scheduled runs.
False BUY or false SELL cohorts reveal a repeatable regime, sector, concentration, or data-quality failure mode.

retirement_gates.trigger: A challenger passes all promotion gates and replaces the prior champion.
A frozen candidate lacks enough sealed matured evidence after two full evaluation windows and no longer matches current data assumptions.
A model remains on probation for two consecutive governance reviews without passing remediation gates.

rollback_gates.trigger: Any code path places, previews, modifies, or cancels a trade, option, watchlist, or other Robinhood write action.
Private portfolio data, credentials, or account identifiers are committed or published.
Historical forecasts or failed outcomes are rewritten outside an explicit append-only correction record.
A model is promoted from raw in-sample, unsealed, or false-discovery-uncorrected evidence.
The dashboard emits a BUY or SELL label from stale, missing, or POOR required price data.

review_cadence.weekly: Operational health, refresh failures, stale data, and failed-current forecasts.
review_cadence.monthly: Calibration, false-direction cohorts, time-period stability, and probation decisions.
review_cadence.quarterly: Promotion, retirement, rollback review, and candidate freeze decisions.
